business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

positives: 42 years in business with 28 years under current management.
Formal safety program and formal written safety program are in place.
Formal return-to-work or modified duty program is in place.
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits.
Four of five listed premises are sprinklered.
concerns: Hazardous materials are used or encountered in operations.

Subcontractor controls are weak: no written contracts with all subcontractors, no certificates of insurance required before work begins, and no hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors.
40% of work is performed by subcontractors.
Demolition or blasting operations are performed.
One listed warehouse location is not sprinklered.
Prior claim activity is notable, and 2022 reflects a cancellation.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 2024 Nationwide Insurance premium 1634721.63 with 13 claims and no cancellation; 2023 Berkshire Hathaway Guard premium 1476849.96 with 10 claims and no cancellation; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group premium 1369245.71 with 4 claims and a cancellation.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Years in business: 42. Employees: 425 full-time and 45 part-time. Annual revenue / gross receipts: 95000000. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. Largest projects completed in the past 3 years: 1) 1200000 restaurant build-out, 2) 800000 medical office renovation, 3) 650000 church addition.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Do you have a formal safety program? Yes. Is there a formal return-to-work or modified duty program? Yes. Does the applicant maintain OSHA 300 logs and conduct regular job-site safety audits? Yes. Does the applicant have a formal written safety program? Yes.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2024 Nationwide Insurance: premium 1634721.63, 13 claims, cancellations No. 2023 Berkshire Hathaway Guard: premium 1476849.96, 10 claims, cancellations No. 2022 Zurich Insurance Group: premium 1369245.71, 4 claims, cancellations Yes.
